title: First-Touch Sheet Shell
summary: A calm mobile-first Playground shell with the live WordPress site as the default view, a compact URL/save bar, and clear bottom-sheet homes for Launch, Files, Data, and Settings.

title: Calm Canvas Inspector
summary: A first-touch calm Figma-inspired Playground shell with one selected live-site frame, sparse toolbar, contextual Site Manager inspector, route-aware launcher inputs, full blueprint gallery, minimap controls, focus mode, and typed destructive reset confirmation.

title: Play Deck
summary: A calm Epic-inspired launcher that opens into a full-size WordPress play mode, with route-specific launch forms and a collapsible Site Manager.

title: First-touch Settings
summary: A Ventura-inspired Playground shell that opens on a calm full live preview, then reveals launch routes, settings, files, blueprint editing, database, logs, saved sites, and export tools through one searchable manager with full-size preview mode.

title: First-Touch Calm Settings
summary: A Windows 11 Settings-refined Playground shell that defaults to a full live site, then opens launcher, tools, settings, gallery, and export flows in a calm split management surface with focus mode.

title: Calm Glass Control Center
summary: A first-touch calm Playground shell where the live WordPress site fills the canvas and launch, tools, settings, files, database, logs, and blueprints unfold from a contrast-safe frosted control center.

title: Tabs Focus
summary: A quiet tabs-only Playground shell where Site stays full-size by default, launcher and tools become peer tabs, and overflow/focus modes keep the live iframe central.

title: Calm iPad Split View
summary: An iPad multitasking Playground redesign with a calm live-site default, collapsible Split View tools, Slide Over launchpad, saved-site dock, route-specific inputs, and destructive reset confirmation.

title: Calm Inspector Playground
summary: A quiet browser-first Playground shell with a prominent unsaved warning, full-size live site, collapsible DevTools-style Site Manager, and launcher routes that reveal their required inputs.

title: Calm Site With Event Trail
summary: A quiet visual-first Playground shell where the live WordPress iframe stays central, launch and tools open on demand, and a collapsed event history explains save, reset, import, export, logs, and blueprint consequences without dominating the first viewport.

title: Pocket Focus Shell
summary: A mobile sheet shell that keeps the live WordPress site central, uses clear bottom homes for Launcher, Files, Data, and Settings, and adds a full-size site mode with essential controls still reachable.

title: Full-size Canvas
summary: A calm Figma-inspired Playground shell with one selected site frame, sparse top chrome, route-aware launcher, contextual inspector, minimap controls, and a focus mode that gives the live WordPress iframe the full screen while preserving Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls.

title: Launch to Play
summary: An Epic-style Playground launcher that opens into a full-size site-first play mode with essential HUD controls, route-aware start forms, a collapsible Site Manager, and explicit reset confirmation.

title: Full Size Settings Preview
summary: A Ventura-inspired Playground shell that keeps the live WordPress site full-size by default, docks searchable settings and Site Manager tools on demand, and preserves a reachable full-site mode with Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls.

title: Fluent Focus Playground
summary: A Windows 11 Settings refined redesign where the live WordPress iframe stays central, tools sit in calm Mica-style categories, and Focus mode gives the site a full-size route while keeping Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls visible.

title: Glass Control Center
summary: A site-first glassmorphism redesign where the WordPress iframe fills the workspace, frosted controls dock at the edges, and Focus Site mode keeps only Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls visible.

title: Full-Size Site Tabs
summary: A tabs-only Playground shell where every management surface is a tab, while a full-size Site focus mode keeps Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and Exit controls pinned over the live iframe.

title: Full-size iPad Workspace
summary: A site-first iPad multitasking redesign with a primary live WordPress pane, swappable Split View tools, Slide Over launcher, saved-site Dock, and a full-size mode that keeps URL, Save, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls reachable.

title: Inspector Focus
summary: A site-first Playground shell with a strong browser top bar, loud unsaved warning, dockable DevTools inspector, route-aware launcher, and full-size site mode.

title: Route Dock Sheet Shell
summary: A mobile sheet shell that keeps the live WordPress site central while Launch, Files, Data/Logs, and Settings get distinct bottom homes with route-specific input forms, save visibility, and full-size preview mode.

title: Calm Canvas Route Inspector
summary: A restrained Figma-inspired Playground workspace with one selected live WordPress frame, explicit route input forms, a contextual inspector, minimap controls, full-size site mode, and strong reset confirmation.

title: Launch Deck to Play Mode
summary: An Epic-style launch library with explicit route input forms for PRs, GitHub imports, blueprint URLs, and ZIP restores, paired with an uncluttered full-size WordPress play mode and a collapsible tools deck.

title: Tabs Route Workbench
summary: A tabs-only Playground shell that keeps the live Site tab central, exposes route-specific launcher forms, and provides a full-size focus mode with Save, URL, WP Admin, Homepage, and exit controls.
